candidates.title: How Amazon Bedrock catches AI-generated phishing
candidates.summary: Social engineering through phishing remains one of the most common tactics for launching cyberattacks. AI-generated phishing email messages now pose a new challenge for security teams managing email systems, significantly raising the risk because of their advanced sophistication. Modern social engineers use generative AI and open source intelligence (OSINT) to craft thousands of unique messages […]

candidates.title: Best practices for multi-turn reinforcement learning in Amazon SageMaker AI
candidates.summary: In this post, we share best practices for reliable multi-turn RL training. We cover how to build a training environment you can trust, set up an external evaluation, design a reward aligned with the end task, manage what changes once the agent runs for multiple turns, and monitor the metrics that tell you when to iterate.

candidates.title: Mark Zuckerberg tells staff that AI agents haven’t progressed as quickly as he’d hoped
candidates.summary: At an internal meeting, the Meta CEO reportedly said that AI development efforts were not moving as quickly as anticipated.

candidates.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
candidates.summary: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.
